creator: skreuzer@exit2shell.com
text:
I just applied the diff and upgraded the port. Everything looks good.

You have my permission to commit this patch.

Thanks

On Mon, Jan 07, 2008 at 09:00:12AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of databases/innotop,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/119412 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/119412
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
